summary: Tested form submission flows (Travel, Advisory, Stay) and new features (Pet Achievements, Pet Soul Score documentation). All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend forms verified via Playwright.

issues: Nested <a> tags causing React hydration warning - <a> inside Link component

details: Plan My Trip button opens wizard modal
Step 1: Travel type selection (Cab, Flight, Train, Relocation)
Step 2: Pet selection with user's pets displayed
Step 3: Trip details form with pickup/drop locations
Mira AI panel provides personalized suggestions
Cab travel request returns success with TRV-* request ID
Flight travel request works correctly
Response includes status, message, and typical_response_time
Page loads with Expert Guidance heading
Request Consultation button redirects to login (expected for unauthenticated users)
Advisory types displayed correctly
Behaviour advisory request returns success with ADV-* request ID
Nutrition advisory request works correctly
Creates support ticket (TKT-*) for follow-up
Request Booking button opens multi-step modal
Step 1: Guest Details with name field
Multi-step form detected correctly
Properties load from API
Booking request returns success with stay-bk-* booking ID
Invalid property ID correctly rejected with 404
GET /api/stay/properties returns property list
AchievementsGrid component displays in overview tab
Shows 'Mojo's Achievements' with 3/14 unlocked, 60 total points
Tier achievements (First Steps, Soul Seeker, Soul Explorer)
Category achievements computed from scoreState
Special achievements (photo_uploaded, allergy_aware) tracked
Pet Soul Score link in sidebar navigation
Documentation sections: What It Is, Score Categories, Tier System
API Endpoints documented
Achievements & Gamification section
Frontend Integration code examples

critical_code_review_comments: Logo.jsx: Has nested <a> tag inside Link component causing React hydration warning - should use span or div instead of <a> for the 'The Doggy Company' text
UnifiedPetPage.jsx: Achievements integration well-implemented with computeUnlockedAchievements() function
AdminDocs.jsx: Pet Soul Score documentation comprehensive with API endpoints, tier system, and code examples
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_forms_api.py - Created test suite for Travel, Advisory, Stay APIs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Forms (Travel, Advisory, Stay) all working correctly. Backend APIs verified via pytest. UnifiedPetPage achievements integration working - displays AchievementsGrid when user has unlocked achievements. AdminDocs Pet Soul Score documentation at /admin/docs (not /admin-docs). Minor React hydration warning from nested <a> tags in Logo component.
